scripts.release:verify: pnpm --filter @dinachi/core type-check && pnpm --filter @dinachi/core build && pnpm --filter @dinachi/components type-check && pnpm --filter @dinachi/components test -- --run && pnpm --filter @dinachi/components build && pnpm --filter @dinachi/cli type-check && pnpm --filter @dinachi/cli build
scripts.release:pack: pnpm --filter @dinachi/core pack --pack-destination /tmp && pnpm --filter @dinachi/components pack --pack-destination /tmp && pnpm --filter @dinachi/cli pack --pack-destination /tmp
